titleStmt.title: SII 25.261: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 261. (A.R. No. 261 of 1908.) NĀRĀYAṆPĀL, BASTAR STATE, CENTRAL PROVINCES.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Nārāyaṇa.
This Sanskrit epigraph in Nāgarī characters furnishes the details of date viz., Śaka 1033, Khara, Kārttika, full-moon day, Wednesday corresponding to 1111 A.D., October 18.

It records the grant of the village Nārāyaṇapura to the god Nārāyaṇa and some land near the Kharjuri tank to the god Lōkēśvara by Guṇḍamahādēvī, the chief queen of the Mahārāja Dhārāvarsha, the mother of Sōmēśvaradēva and the grandmother of Kanharadēva, who was then ruling after the death of his father. The land is stated to have been endowed free from all encumbrances on the village, the nilaya (dwelling group) and the nāḍu.

It states that the lands of the minister Ādityama Penna, the bhaṭṭanāyaka Prōlliyō, the karaṇa Kudriyama Virama, the nāyakas Sōmana, Rāmanākāsana, Mārayā, the bhaṇḍāri Aitana and the sādhu Vakōmarya were given revenue free. The śrēshṭhin Samara, the brāhmaṇa Chhādrū, the śrēshṭhin Ghughi, the sādhu Śrīdhara, the kōsajā (cocoon producer) Nānū, the mālī Pālāsu Padmāsinivīra the oilman (tailika) Gōvindapātra, the vāvā (bābū) Jasadhavala Milāpi and others are referred to as gṛihavēṭakas and Purushōttama as the illustrious paṇḍit. Also land was granted free from taxes to Sūtradhāra Raṇavirāya.

Further, the lands of adhikāri Chhādrūka, Brahmāujhāka, Mahaṇuka, Kanharasāi and Nāgakuladvara are granted free from taxes. Some land was endowed tax-free. Some land was endwoed tax-free to Bhaṭṭāraka Bhāvadēva.

It records, in addition to the above grants, grant of land to the deity Nārāyaṇa, free from taxes. A number of persons are referred to as the witnesses to the above grant. One of the witnesses named Mahaṇaka Dēvadāsa also figures in the Kuruspāl inscription of Dhāraṇa-mahādēvī of the time of Sōmēśvara (See Ep. Ind., Vol. X, p. 33, Textline 12).
(Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. IX, pp. 311 ff and plate facing p. 314).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Om svasti sahasra phaṇāmaṇikiraṇa nikaravā bhāsu
ra nāgavaṁśodbhava bhogāvatī puravareśvara sa
vatsa vyāghralāṁchana kāsyapagotra prakaṭīkṛta
vijayaghoṣaṇalabdha viśva viśvaṁbhara parameśvara para
ma bhaṭṭāraka maheśvara caraṇakaṁja kiṁjalka puṁjapiṁjarita bhramarāyamāṇa satyahariścaṁ
dra saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara śrīmadrājaṁ bhūṣaṇamahārāja dhārāvarṣadeva pādā
nāṁ paṭṭamahādevī jagadekamātā sāsana paṭṭadārā nāma nāmatā gaṁ
gājala dhauta parama pavitra kṛtottamāṁgi dhārāvarṣa maheśvarārddhāṁṅgi pā
rthiveṁdrakulāṁganā pārvvatī bhāsurācāra bhāgīrathī parama pativratā
cāra Araṁdhuti saujanya saraśvati śaraṇāgata rakṣāmaṇi vaṁdhucintāmaṇi
sauvineyābhinava sāvitri kṣamācāra dharitri śrīmadguṇḍamahādevi Ā
sāṁ putranāmnā sahasraphaṇāmaṇi kiraṇa nikarāvabhāsura nāgavaṁśo
dbhava bhogāvatīpuravareśvara saṁvatsa vyāghralāṁchana kāsyapagotra praka
ṭīkṛta vijayaghoṣaṇa labdha viśva viśvaṁbhara parameśvara parama bhaṭṭā
raka maheśvara caraṇakaṁja kiṁjalka puṁja piṁjarita bhramarāyamāṇa sa
tya hariścaṁdra saraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara pratigaṇḍabhairava śrīmadrāja
bhūṣaṇa māhārāja someśvaradeva śvarggata teṣāṁ putrasya Āsāṁ namuḥ
samasya rājāvalīvirājyamāṇa śrīmadvīra kanharadevasya kalyāṇa vijayarā
jye sakanṛpa kālātīte dasasatatraya tṛṁśādhakeśvarasaṁvatsare kārtti
ka paurṇṇamāsyāṁ vuddhavāre saṁsāra samudrottāraṇa taraṁḍāya jñānaratna karaṁḍā
ya svarggārga lodghāṭanakarāya śrīmannārāyaṇadevāya śrīmadguṇḍamahādevyā
sakalamanityamadhruvamaśāśvataṁ dṛṣṭvā svarggāggalodghāṭanārthe nārāyaṇapuro
nāmagrāmo nānādeśīya janākīrṇṇa ścaṁdrārkasthityudadhikālaṁ yāvat
pradattaḥ . tathā śrī lokeśvara devāya kharjjurivaṁdha samīpasthā bhūmipradattā
śrīmat pregaḍā Ādityamapenna bhaṭṭanāyaka prolliyo karaṇakariyala
virāmanāyaka somananāyaka rāmanākāsūnu nāyaka malayo bhaṁḍārī
a tana vedo maśya . Aiteṣāṁ bhūmiḥ Akareṇa pradattā samara śreṣṭhi
chādrūvāmaṇa śreṣṭhi ghughi śrīdhara sādhunānū kosajala pālāsupādmasi
nivirā mālī goiṁdapratra tailika jasadhavalavāvū mīlāpi nāvejāṇaṁ kā
pālādhikā samṛdāraṇa dhavalamāṇiyāsthi śrī vāsudeva Aitairgṛhave
ṭakarupeṇa śrīmannārāyaṇadeva pādeṣu sadā sthātavyaṁkaraṁ ca dātavyaṁ
śrimanpaṁḍita puruṣottamāya grāma nilaya nāḍa sarvvabādhā parihareṇa . caṁdrā
rka kālaṁ pradatta . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyoharedva suṁdharā sa viṣṭāyāṁ kṛ
mī bhūtvā kulajaiḥ sahasīdati . taḍāgānāṁ sahasreṇa Asvamedha sata
na ca gevāṁ koṭi pradānena bhūmiharttā na sudyati . maṁgala mahā śrī
sūtradhāra raṇavīrāya bhūmi pradattā
Akareṇa
Adhikārī chādrūkasya bhūmi Akareṇa
dattā . brahmaujākasya bhūmi dattā sāsa
naṁ Akareṇa mahaṇuka
sya tathā kanharasāi
nāgakuladvara Ai
teṣāṁ bhūmi Aka
reṇa dattā prithunā
bhaṭṭāra
ka bhāva
devāya
bhūmi Akareṇa datā
svasti śrī dhāraṇamahādevi sarvvabādhā parihāreṇa Akare
ṇa bhūmidattā deva śrī nāgesvarasyā May also be read ‘nārāyaṇasyārthe’mahāṇaka devadāsa
jaggatī . sādhu himasutta dedaṇa lakṣmaṇa caudharī
śrī dhāraṇa mahādevyā bhūmi dataru Ara śrī de bhūmi dattā . Akareṇa .
Digital edition of SII 25.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
